title: Greenhouse Climate Monitoring and Control System
description: Developed an automated system to monitor and control climate conditions within a greenhouse using Arduino Uno. Integrated DHT sensors for temperature and humidity, and LDR sensors for light intensity measurement.

title: Smart Locker RFID with Telegram Bot Notification
description: Designed and constructed a security system for lockers using RFID technology for access control. Integrated a Telegram Bot feature to provide real-time entry and security notifications to the user's smartphone.

title: HLP Machine Control Panel based on OMRON CS1G PLC
description: Engineered and assembled a specialized control panel for HLP (Hinge Lid Packer) machinery using OMRON CS1G PLC systems. Integrated hardware components and programmed logic sequences to enhance machine automation and reliability.
